next_steps: Echocardiography-guided or fluoroscopy-guided biopsy of the right atrial mass
PET/CT scan to evaluate for primary malignancy and systemic involvement
Histopathological and immunohistochemical analysis of biopsy specimen
Consultation with cardiothoracic surgery for evaluation of diagnostic/debulking biopsy
Oncology consultation to discuss potential chemotherapy or palliative management
